hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Your AI-Powered Gateway to Real-World Language Mastery

about.intro: At our Hong Kong-based edtech studio, we are thrilled to introduce RadioTranslator - the first product in our planned series of AI-driven educational tools that bridge the gap between classroom learning and real-world language application.

vision.title: Our Clear Product Vision
vision.description: We have developed a comprehensive roadmap for RadioTranslator that transforms how learners engage with foreign languages:

feature1.title: Core Listening Technology:
feature1.desc: Real-time speech recognition and translation of podcasts, news broadcasts, and authentic audio content

feature2.title: Interactive Learning Suite:
feature2.desc: Tap-to-translate functionality with personalized vocabulary builders

feature3.title: Multi-Speed Playback:
feature3.desc: Adaptive audio processing that maintains voice clarity at any speed

feature1.title: AI Pronunciation Coach:
feature1.desc: Voice analysis with visual feedback for accent improvement

feature2.title: Personalized Learning Paths:
feature2.desc: Algorithmically generated study plans based on your progress and goals

feature3.title: Expanded Content Library:
feature3.desc: Curated audio collections across 6 proficiency levels

feature1.title: Social Learning Features:
feature1.desc: Connect with fellow learners for practice and motivation

feature2.title: Educator Portal:
feature2.desc: Classroom tools for teachers implementing RadioTranslator

feature3.title: Advanced Content Categories:
feature3.desc: Specialized audio for business, travel, and academic purposes

different.title: Why Our Approach is Different
different.intro: Unlike conventional language apps that rely on simulated dialogues, RadioTranslator immerses users in genuine content while providing AI-powered scaffolding:

point1.title: Contextual Intelligence
point1.desc: Our AI doesn't just translate - it explains cultural references, idiomatic expressions, and contextual meanings, turning every audio segment into a rich cultural lesson.

point2.title: Adaptive Difficulty Scaling
point2.desc: The system continuously assesses your comprehension level and subtly adjusts content complexity, ensuring you're always challenged but never overwhelmed.

point3.title: Real-World Skill Transfer
point3.desc: By working with authentic audio materials, learners develop the listening comprehension skills needed for actual conversations, not just classroom scenarios.

framework.title: Proven Educational Framework
framework.intro: RadioTranslator implements established language acquisition principles through modern technology:

point1.title: Comprehensible Input+:
point1.desc: Making real-world content accessible at every level

point2.title: Spaced Repetition 2.0:
point2.desc: Contextual vocabulary review within meaningful content

point3.title: Metacognitive Development:
point3.desc: Tools that help learners understand and optimize their own learning process

cta.title: Join Our Learning Revolution
cta.description: We're building more than just an app - we're creating a comprehensive ecosystem for language acquisition that grows with our users. From casual learners to educational institutions, RadioTranslator adapts to diverse needs while maintaining our core commitment to authentic, AI-enhanced learning.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to RadioTranslator. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully before using our platform.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By creating an account and using RadioTranslator, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.
section1.point1: You must be at least 13 years old to use this service
section1.point2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account
section1.point3: You agree to provide accurate and complete information during registration

section2.title: 2. Service Description
section2.content: RadioTranslator provides AI-powered language learning tools including:
section2.point1: Real-time radio streaming with speech recognition and translation
section2.point2: Interactive learning features including tap-to-translate and vocabulary builders
section2.point3: Multi-speed playback with adaptive audio processing
section2.point4: Personalized learning paths and content recommendations

section3.title: 3. Subscription and Payment
section3.content: RadioTranslator offers both free and premium subscription tiers:
section3.desc1: Access to basic features including limited radio stations, standard quality audio, and time-limited real-time subtitles.
section3.desc2: Subscription fees are billed monthly or annually. All fees are non-refundable except as required by law or as stated in our refund policy. You may cancel your subscription at any time, and cancellation will take effect at the end of your current billing period.

section4.title: 4. User Conduct and Prohibited Activities
section4.content: You agree not to: (a) use the service for any illegal purpose; (b) attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems; (c) interfere with or disrupt the service; (d) share your account credentials with others; (e) use automated scripts or bots to access the service; (f) reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from our content without permission; (g) reverse engineer or attempt to extract source code from our software.

section5.title: 5. Intellectual Property Rights
section5.content: All content, features, and functionality of RadioTranslator, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, software, and audio content, are owned by HONGKONG MACRODATA TECHNOLOGY LIMITED or our licensors and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

section5.point2: You retain ownership of any content you create using our service
section5.point3: Third-party content (radio broadcasts, podcasts) remains the property of their respective owners

section6.title: 6. Privacy and Data Protection
section6.content: Your privacy is important to us. Our collection, use, and protection of your personal information is governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. By using RadioTranslator, you consent to our data practices as described in the Privacy Policy.

section7.title: 7. Disclaimers and Limitations of Liability
section7.content: RadioTranslator is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free. We are not responsible for the accuracy of AI-generated translations or transcriptions. To the maximum extent permitted by law, HONGKONG MACRODATA TECHNOLOGY LIMITED shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the service.

section8.title: 8. Modifications to Service and Terms
section8.content: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time. We may also update these Terms of Service periodically. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified terms. We will notify users of material changes via email or through the service.

section9.title: 9. Termination
section9.content: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your account and access to the service at our sole discretion, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties, or for any other reason. Upon termination, your right to use the service will immediately cease.

help.title: Help Center

getting-started.title: Getting Started
getting-started.description: New to RadioTranslator? Learn the basics here.

questions.question: What is RadioTranslator?
questions.answer: RadioTranslator is an AI-powered language learning platform that allows you to listen to live radio stations from around the world with real-time subtitles and translations. It's designed to help you learn languages through authentic content.

questions.question: How do I create an account?
questions.answer: Click the 'Sign Up' button in the top navigation bar. Fill in your username, email, and password. After registration, you can immediately start using the free tier features.

questions.question: What's the difference between free and premium accounts?
questions.answer: Free accounts have access to basic radio stations, standard quality audio, and time-limited real-time subtitles. Premium accounts unlock HD audio quality, unlimited subtitles, multi-language translation, offline downloads, ad-free experience, and priority customer support.

questions.question: How do I start listening to radio stations?
questions.answer: After logging in, navigate to the Dashboard or Radio Stations page. Browse available stations by country, language, or genre. Click on any station to start streaming. Real-time subtitles will appear automatically if your account has this feature enabled.

questions.question: What languages are supported?
questions.answer: RadioTranslator supports 50+ languages for both speech recognition and translation, including English, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, and many more.

account.title: Account Management
account.description: Manage your account settings and preferences.

questions.question: How do I change my password?
questions.answer: Go to your Dashboard and click on 'Account Settings'. Navigate to the 'Security' section where you can update your password. You'll need to enter your current password to confirm the change.

questions.question: Can I change my email address?
questions.answer: Yes, go to Dashboard > Account Settings > Profile. Click 'Edit' next to your email address. You'll receive a verification email at the new address to confirm the change.

questions.question: How do I delete my account?
questions.answer: We're sorry to see you go. To delete your account, go to Dashboard > Account Settings > Privacy. Scroll to the bottom and click 'Delete Account'. Note that this action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data, including saved stations and learning history, will be permanently deleted.

questions.question: I forgot my password. What should I do?
questions.answer: On the login page, click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your registered email address, and we'll send you a password reset link. Follow the instructions in the email to create a new password.

questions.question: Can I have multiple devices logged in?
questions.answer: Yes! You can use RadioTranslator on multiple devices simultaneously. Your preferences, favorites, and learning progress will sync across all devices automatically.

features.title: Features & Usage
features.description: Learn how to use RadioTranslator's powerful features.

questions.question: How do real-time subtitles work?
questions.answer: Our AI-powered speech recognition system listens to the radio stream and converts speech to text in real-time. The subtitles appear with minimal delay (typically 1-2 seconds) and support multiple languages. Premium users get unlimited subtitle access, while free users have time-limited access.

questions.question: How accurate are the translations?
questions.answer: Our neural network translation engine provides 90-95% accuracy for most major languages. Accuracy may vary based on audio quality, speaker accents, and technical terminology. We continuously improve our models based on user feedback.

questions.question: Can I adjust playback speed?
questions.answer: Yes! Click the settings icon while listening to any station. You can adjust playback speed from 0.5x to 2.0x without affecting voice quality, thanks to our adaptive audio processing technology.

questions.question: How do I save my favorite stations?
questions.answer: Click the heart icon ❤️ next to any station to add it to your favorites. Access your saved stations anytime from the Dashboard under 'My Favorites'.

questions.question: What is the offline download feature?
questions.answer: Premium members can download radio segments for offline listening. Click the download icon next to any recording. Downloaded content remains available for 30 days and can be accessed from Dashboard > Downloads even without internet connection.

questions.question: How does the tap-to-translate feature work?
questions.answer: While viewing subtitles, tap or click on any word or phrase to see its translation and definition. The word will also be added to your personal vocabulary builder for future review.

subscription.title: Subscription & Billing
subscription.description: Questions about pricing, payments, and subscriptions.

questions.question: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.answer: We accept Alipay, WeChat Pay, major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), and debit cards. All payments are processed securely through our payment partners.

questions.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
questions.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time without penalties. Go to Dashboard > Subscription > Manage Plan and click 'Cancel Subscription'. Your premium features will remain active until the end of your current billing period.

questions.question: Do you offer refunds?
questions.answer: Yes, we offer a 7-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied with your premium subscription within the first 7 days, contact us at dev2@xingke888.com for a full refund.

questions.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
questions.answer: Absolutely! You can change your plan at any time from Dashboard > Subscription. When upgrading, you'll be charged a prorated amount for the remainder of your billing cycle. When downgrading, the change will take effect at the end of your current billing period.

questions.question: Will my subscription auto-renew?
questions.answer: Yes, subscriptions automatically renew at the end of each billing cycle to ensure uninterrupted service. You'll receive an email reminder 7 days before renewal. You can turn off auto-renewal in your subscription settings.

questions.question: Do you offer student or educational discounts?
questions.answer: Yes! We offer 30% off for verified students and educators. Contact us at dev2@xingke888.com with proof of enrollment or employment at an educational institution to receive your discount code.

questions.question: What are the system requirements?
questions.answer:
RadioTranslator works on:
- Web browsers: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge (latest versions)
- Operating systems: Windows 10+, macOS 10.14+, Linux, iOS 13+, Android 8+
- Internet: Minimum 2 Mbps connection for standard quality, 5 Mbps for HD audio
- No additional software installation required

questions.question: Why is the audio quality poor?
questions.answer:
Audio quality depends on:
1. Your internet connection speed (check using speedtest.net)
2. The source station's broadcast quality
3. Your selected quality setting (Free users get standard quality, Premium users get HD)

Try switching to a different network or reducing quality settings if experiencing issues.

questions.question: Can I use RadioTranslator on mobile devices?
questions.answer: Yes! RadioTranslator is fully optimized for mobile browsers. Simply visit our website on your mobile device. We're also developing native iOS and Android apps (coming in Q2 2025).

questions.question: Does RadioTranslator work with VPN?
questions.answer: Yes, RadioTranslator works with most VPN services. However, some stations may have geographic restrictions. If you experience connectivity issues, try disconnecting your VPN or switching to a different server location.

questions.question: How much data does streaming use?
questions.answer:
Data usage varies by quality:
- Standard quality: ~60 MB per hour
- HD quality: ~120 MB per hour
- With subtitles: Add approximately 5-10 MB per hour

We recommend using WiFi for extended listening sessions.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.description: Solutions to common problems and issues.

questions.question: The radio stream won't play. What should I do?
questions.answer:
Try these steps:
1. Refresh your browser (F5 or Cmd+R)
2. Clear your browser cache and cookies
3. Check your internet connection
4. Try a different browser
5. Disable browser extensions that might block streaming
6. Check if your firewall is blocking the connection

If the problem persists, contact our support team.

questions.question: Subtitles are not appearing.
questions.answer:
Check the following:
1. Ensure subtitles are enabled (click the CC button)
2. Verify your account has subtitle access (free users have time limits)
3. Some stations may not support real-time subtitles due to audio quality
4. Refresh the page and try again
5. Check if the selected language is supported for that station

questions.question: Translations are not showing or are incorrect.
questions.answer:
If translations aren't working:
1. Make sure you've selected a target language in settings
2. Verify your premium subscription is active (free users have limited translation)
3. Some specialized terminology may not translate accurately
4. Report incorrect translations to help us improve: Dashboard > Report Issue

questions.question: I'm experiencing lag or buffering.
questions.answer:
To reduce lag and buffering:
1. Check your internet speed (minimum 2 Mbps required)
2. Close other applications using bandwidth
3. Switch to a lower quality setting
4. Move closer to your WiFi router
5. Restart your router if issues persist
6. Try listening during off-peak hours

questions.question: My payment failed. What should I do?
questions.answer:
If your payment didn't go through:
1. Verify your payment details are correct
2. Ensure you have sufficient funds
3. Check if your card supports international transactions
4. Try a different payment method
5. Contact your bank to ensure they're not blocking the transaction
6. If issues continue, email dev2@xingke888.com with your order details

questions.question: I can't log in to my account.
questions.answer:
If you're having trouble logging in:
1. Double-check your email and password (passwords are case-sensitive)
2. Use the 'Forgot Password' link to reset your password
3. Clear your browser cookies and cache
4. Try logging in from a different browser or device
5. Make sure your account hasn't been suspended (check your email for notifications)

Still can't access your account? Contact support at dev2@xingke888.com
